mapper.select:
SELECT product_id, category_id, name, description, price, image_url, brand, status, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM products
deleted_at IS NULL
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY product_id DESC
SELECT product_id, category_id, name, description, price, image_url, brand, status, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM products WHERE product_id = #{productId}
